2021-22 SMU Mustangs Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 24-9 (13-4, 2nd in AAC MBB)

Coach: Tim Jankovich

PS/G: 73.8 (104th of 358)

PA/G: 67.1 (113th of 358)

SRS: 11.13 (53rd of 358)

SOS: 4.44 (95th of 358)

ORtg: 105.8 (118th of 358)

DRtg: 96.2 (69th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +15000
